slide_1.title: 🌍 Multi-Language Reviews: Connect with Customers Worldwide

content.text: The star of this update is our new Multi-Language Widget and Review Translation feature. In today’s global marketplace, language barriers shouldn’t limit your store’s potential. With TrustShop 2.8, customers can now translate reviews into their native language with a single click.
A new way to collect customer reviews. When customers scan the QR code, they can:
list: See products they haven’t reviewed yet

content.text: Perfect your brand presentation with enhanced email customization:
Keep your customer communication clean and effective with our new unsubscribe management system. Track, analyze, and maintain your customer lists with precision:
Access customer reviews directly from Shopify’s customer details page. No more switching between tabs – everything you need is right where you need it!

popup_support.title: How can we help you?
popup_support.content: You can access our extensive help documents, and our team is always available to assist you. Just contact us!
